login.description: Sign in to continue to SebairTel
login.emailNotVerified: Your email has not been verified. Please check your inbox.

signup.joinUs: Join us today and start your journey!
signup.passwordsNoMatchDesc: Please make sure you've entered the same password twice.
signup.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.description: We have sent an activation link to
verifyEmail.checkSpam: If you don't find the email, please check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.linkSentDesc: A new verification link has been sent.
verifyEmail.failedToSend: Failed to send email. You may have requested a link too many times. Please try again later.

createPost.placeholder: What's on your mind, my friend?
createPost.fileTooLargeDesc: Please choose a file smaller than 1MB.
createPost.unsupportedFileTypeDesc: Please choose an image or video file.

postCard.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
postCard.reportReceivedDesc: Thank you, we will review the post.
postCard.confirmDeleteDesc: This will permanently delete this post and cannot be undone.

liveFeed.joinLiveDesc: Watch or start your own stream now.
liveFeed.noLiveStreams: No live streams at the moment
liveFeed.noLiveStreamsDesc: Be the first to start a live stream and share your thoughts!
liveFeed.noPastStreamsDesc: Saved streams from previous live sessions will appear here.

newsView.description: Follow the latest developments and events from trusted sources around the world.
newsView.news1_title: New technology promises a revolution in the world of AI
newsView.news1_desc: A team of researchers has unveiled a new AI model that can learn from smaller amounts of data, opening new horizons for applications in various fields.
newsView.news2_title: Financial markets experience volatility after new economic decisions
newsView.news2_desc: Global stock markets reacted mixedly to the recently announced economic measures, amid a state of uncertainty among investors.
newsView.news3_title: Discovery of a new planet that could be habitable
newsView.news3_desc: Astronomers have announced the discovery of an exoplanet located in the habitable zone, increasing the likelihood of liquid water on its surface.
newsView.news4_title: Thrilling sports final holds breaths and ends with an unexpected result
newsView.news4_desc: In a marathon match, the visiting team managed to achieve a dramatic victory in the final minutes, winning the title for the first time in its history.

marketView.title: Business Center
marketView.description: The perfect place to find jobs, advertise services, and explore companies in your community.
marketView.jobsDesc: Find job opportunities or advertise your services to a wide audience.
marketView.companiesDesc: Explore a directory of local companies and institutions and connect with them directly.
marketView.comingSoonDesc: We're working hard to launch this section. Stay tuned for updates!

storeView.title: Local Market & Services
storeView.description: Everything you need from stores, pharmacies, and services in one place.
storeView.storesDesc: Browse local stores and their products, and order your needs directly.
storeView.pharmaciesDesc: Find the nearest pharmacy or available health service in your area.

aiView.title: Creativity Center
aiView.description: Use the power of AI for creation and analysis. Choose one of the tools below to get started.
aiView.imgGenDesc: Turn your ideas into unique images.
aiView.codeAssistDesc: Explain, fix, and optimize code snippets.

imageGenerator.title: AI Image Generator
imageGenerator.description: Write a detailed text description of the image you envision, and the AI will bring it to life.
imageGenerator.placeholder: Example: A cat wearing a wizard hat reading a book in an old library
imageGenerator.promptEmptyDesc: Please enter a description for the image you want to create.
imageGenerator.errorDesc: Failed to generate the image. Please try again.

stickerGenerator.title: Sticker Maker
stickerGenerator.description: Turn your ideas into cool stickers for chats. The sticker will be generated with a transparent background.
stickerGenerator.placeholder: Example: A cute frog coding on a laptop
stickerGenerator.promptEmptyDesc: Please enter a description for the sticker you want to create.
stickerGenerator.errorDesc: Failed to generate the sticker. Please try again.

codeAnalyzer.title: AI Code Analyzer
codeAnalyzer.description: Enter any code snippet (like Javascript, HTML, Python) and choose the desired task.
codeAnalyzer.promptEmptyDesc: Please enter a code snippet to analyze.
codeAnalyzer.errorDesc: Failed to process the request. Please try again.

callsView.comingSoon: This feature will be available soon!

usersView.noFriends: You haven't added any friends yet.
usersView.noRequests: You have no pending friend requests.
usersView.noSuggestions: No new suggestions at this time.
usersView.requestSentDesc: A friend request has been sent to {name}.
usersView.requestDeclinedDesc: You have declined the friend request from {name}.
usersView.requestErrorDesc: We couldn't send the friend request. Please try again.

callsList.userNotFound: User not found to start the call.
callsList.noUserForMissed: No available users to add a missed call.
callsList.noCallsDesc: You haven't made or received any calls yet.

chatInterface.selectConversationDesc: Choose a conversation from the list to start chatting.

chatView.replySoon: The reply feature will be activated soon.
chatView.confirmClearDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all messages in this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
chatView.clearFeatureSoon: This feature will be activated soon
chatView.confirmBlockDesc: Are you sure you want to block {name}? You will not be able to send or receive messages from them.

messageInput.micErrorDesc: Please ensure you have granted permission to use the microphone.

liveStreamPage.camPermsErrorDesc: Please enable camera and microphone permissions in your browser.
liveStreamPage.camUnavailableDesc: Cannot start the live stream. Please allow access to camera and microphone and try again.
liveStreamPage.invitationSentDesc: An invitation has been sent to {name} to join.
liveStreamPage.removedDesc: {name} has been removed from the stream.
liveStreamPage.requestSentDesc: You have sent a request to join the stream as a co-host.
liveStreamPage.endStreamDesc: Would you like to save and publish this live stream to your profile?
liveStreamPage.streamSavedDesc: Your live stream has been saved to your profile.

profilePage.userNotFoundDesc: The link may be incorrect or the user may have been deleted.
profilePage.linkCopiedDesc: You can now share their profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: This is your public profile information.
settings.nameRequiredDesc: The name field cannot be empty.
settings.imgTooLargeDesc: Please choose an image smaller than 1MB.
settings.updateSuccessDesc: Your profile information has been updated successfully.
settings.updateErrorDesc: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the app. Will be saved automatically for your current device.
settings.customizeUiDesc: Control which sections appear in the navigation bar.
settings.showCommunityDesc: View public posts, news, and live streams.
settings.showAppsDesc: View a list of mini-apps and services.
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose how you want to be notified.
settings.enableAllDesc: Master switch to enable or disable all alerts.
settings.messageNotifsDesc: Receive notifications when new messages arrive.
settings.mentionsDesc: Receive notifications when someone mentions you.
settings.missedCallsDesc: Receive a notification for any missed calls.
settings.soundsDesc: Customize alert sounds for messages, calls, and other notifications.
settings.privacyDesc: Control how your information appears and who can interact with you.
settings.whoCanAdd: Who can add me as a friend?
settings.blockedContactsDesc: Manage the users you have blocked.
settings.accountDesc: Manage your account settings and secure it.
settings.featureSoon: This feature will be activated soon.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Your account and all your data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the application interface.

notificationsView.title: Notifications
notificationsView.noNotificationsDesc: Notifications about new interactions will appear here.
